caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey wig, glasses, and black headphones sits in a recording studio. He wears a white button-down shirt with a red and gold bow tie and light-colored suspenders. To his left is a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and pieces of clothing, including shirts with "LEE" visible. In the background, another person wearing a dark long-sleeved shirt is partially visible, facing away from the camera. On-screen graphics include a logo featuring a microphone and the text "STALKS PODCAST" on the left and "S TALK JOY" on the right. Across the frames, the man remains seated and speaking, with slight movements of his head and mouth, while the surrounding environment and other individuals remain largely stationary.
